## Task: Delete FilesControllerContractTests.cs (tautological reflection tests)
## Step: review-tests

Delete the file `TestProject.Tests/Controllers/FilesControllerContractTests.cs` in its entirety. It contains ~30 reflection-based tests that assert on the controller's class shape, attributes, constructor signature, and HTTP endpoint surface (verbs, route templates, parameter bindings, return types). Every one of these properties is compiler-enforced by ASP.NET Core MVC attributes and the C# type system — the tests can only fail if the code does not compile, in which case the test runner would not even load them. The controller's actual runtime behavior is already covered behaviorally by `FilesControllerTests.cs`. Do not modify any other file. Verification: `dotnet build TestProject.sln` succeeds; `dotnet test TestProject.Tests/TestProject.Tests.csproj` passes (with ~30 fewer tests).

## Response Format (required)
Respond with ONLY a single valid JSON object matching the schema below.
- No prose, explanations, or commentary before or after the JSON.
- No markdown code fences (```), no headings — output the raw JSON object.
- Do NOT call any tools and do NOT end your turn on a thinking block. Emit the JSON object directly as text.

JSON schema:
{ approved: Whether the implementation is accepted, feedback: Detailed review feedback, issues: Array<{ file: File with the issue, description: What needs to be fixed, severity: "critical" | "minor" /* How important the fix is */ }> }
